title: Opinion: Opinion | US Attack On Chabahar, And Why It's Time India Stopped Playing By Others' Whims
summary_full: As the US destroys Chabahar in Iran, one thing is clear: India cannot wait eternally for the whims of others to do what is vital for its own interests.
summary_public: As the US destroys Chabahar in Iran, one thing is clear: India cannot wait eternally for the whims of others to do what is vital for its own interests.
